channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Arunachal Pradesh emphasises traditional ecological practices to combat climate change
item.description: Itanagar, Arunachal Pradesh – Minister Gabriel D Wangsu highlighted on Thursday that traditional ecological knowledge remains the state's most effective safeguard against climate change. Speaking duri...

item.title: Children’s Day: Nigeria’s shared responsibility for nation building through child welfare and investment
item.description: The article reflects on Children’s Day in Nigeria, stressing that the country’s future is already deeply tied to its children, who make up nearly half of the population. It argues that despite repeate...

item.title: Tanzania Tables TZS 334.35 Billion Budget for Natural Resources and Tourism in 2026/27
item.description: The Tanzanian Ministry of Natural Resources and Tourism has presented a budget of TZS 334.35 billion for the financial year 2026/2027. Out of this, TZS 272.04 billion goes to recurrent expenses like s...

item.title: 4.8-Magnitude Earthquake in Punjab Causes One Death, Several Houses Damaged
item.description: On Tuesday evening, a 4.8-magnitude earthquake struck multiple cities in Punjab and Islamabad, causing panic among residents. According to the Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) and the National...

item.title: Trump refiles defamation lawsuit against Wall Street Journal over Epstein-related report
item.description: President Donald Trump has refiled a defamation lawsuit against The Wall Street Journal after an earlier version of the case was dismissed by a federal judge. The lawsuit centers on a report alleging ...

item.title: CAB lowers fuel surcharge, prompting possible decrease in airfares for early June
item.description: Passengers in the Philippines may see a slight relief in air travel costs in the first half of June, following the Civil Aeronautics Board's (CAB) announcement of a reduced fuel surcharge. According t...

item.title: ODM’s Strategic Choices for 2027: Balancing Coalitions and Party Identity
item.description: Recent signals from ODM leaders, including Oburu Oginga and Gladys Wanga, have sparked discussions about the party's strategy ahead of the 2027 General Election. Oburu plans to defend his Siaya senato...

item.title: New Superconductor Reaches 151 K at Ambient Pressure, Setting a Long-Standing Record
item.description: Researchers at the University of Houston have achieved a significant milestone in superconductivity by developing a material that operates at 151 Kelvin (−122°C) under normal atmospheric pressure. Thi...

item.title: Bail hearing scheduled for two accused in Halifax newborn death investigation
item.description: A bail hearing is scheduled for Thursday morning in Halifax for two individuals charged in connection with the death of a newborn whose remains were discovered following a multi-day search. Sukhpreet ...

item.title: Concerns Over Government-Influenced Stock Gains and Market Distortion
item.description: This opinion article examines the recent surge in Intel’s stock performance and raises concerns about what the author sees as distortions in capitalist markets when government involvement and successf...

item.title: US climber Tyler Andrews sets new Everest speed record with oxygen support
item.description: According to reports, US climber Tyler Andrews has set a new speed record on Mount Everest after reaching the summit of the world’s highest mountain in 9 hours and 55 minutes. The 36-year-old climber ...

item.title: Street Fighter 6 Sets Server Maintenance for Ingrid Release and Season 3 Conclusion Update
item.description: Street Fighter 6 is preparing for its biggest content drop since launching in 2023 as Season 3 comes to a close. Capcom has announced server maintenance on May 27, 2026, starting at 7 p.m. PDT and exp...

item.title: Limpopo Police Warn of Ongoing Violence Despite Crime Decline, Amid Separate Cases of Police Misconduct and Court Delays
item.description: Limpopo Police Commissioner Lieutenant General Thembi Hadebe has raised concerns about persistent violent crime in the province, even though official figures show a decline in serious offences such as...

item.title: Concerns raised over reshuffle in King Misuzulu’s royal household following dismissal of senior aides
item.description: Tensions within the AmaZulu royal household have intensified following the dismissal of two senior officials in King Misuzulu kaZwelithini’s inner circle. Inkosi Malusi Zondi, who served as royal chan...

item.title: US military warns adversaries may be using commercial location data to track troops
item.description: US military officials have raised concerns that American forces deployed in conflict zones are being tracked and potentially targeted using commercially available location data. According to a letter ...

item.title: Stakeholders call for reforms to improve Tanzania’s public education system
item.description: Tanzania is currently facing serious challenges in its public education sector, with growing concern from experts, policymakers, and education stakeholders about widening gaps in access, quality, and ...

item.title: Chandrayaan-2 Identifies Potential Subsurface Ice in Moon’s South Polar Craters
item.description: Scientists analysing data from India’s Chandrayaan-2 mission have discovered strong evidence suggesting the presence of subsurface ice near the Moon’s South Polar Region. This breakthrough comes from ...

item.title: CBI Arrests Retired Judge Giribala Singh in Connection with Twisha Sharma's Death
item.description: On Thursday afternoon, the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) arrested retired judge Giribala Singh in connection with the death of her daughter-in-law, Twisha Sharma. This development came after t...

item.title: Lululemon and founder Chip Wilson reach agreement ending proxy dispute
item.description: Lululemon Athletica and its founder Chip Wilson have reached a truce after a prolonged and very public dispute over the company’s direction and board composition. The agreement marks a pause in a bitt...

item.title: CIDG files obstruction of justice complaint over alleged aid in Sen. Dela Rosa's escape
item.description: The Philippine National Police–Criminal Investigation and Detection Group (PNP-CIDG) has formally filed a complaint for obstruction of justice against Senator Robin Padilla and several others before t...
